version_description: Included the bass changes that the second guitar plays, they are optional but it sounds amazing when they're included.

versions.version_description: From 2023. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/aoJwvnDuAR0.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Note] If you can't stretch to the C# note on the A string, here are three easier ways to play this song:
                 -  Play the "D/C#" as a Dmaj7 (xx0222) and "Gadd#11" like this (320023);
                 -  Transpose -2, put capo 3, and play key of C chords;
                 -  Or ignore the notes altogether and play regular open chords.

Please leave a comment or rate 5 stars.

[Chords]
         EADGBe
[ch]D[/ch]        xx0232
[ch]D/C#[/ch]     x40232
[ch]G[/ch]        320003
[ch]Gadd#11[/ch]  340003
[ch]Bm[/ch]       x24432
[ch]A[/ch]        x02220
[ch]A/C#[/ch]     x42220
[ch]D/F#[/ch]     20023x
[ch]Em[/ch]       022000
[ch]Asus4[/ch]    x02230
[ch]Asus4/C#[/ch] x42230
[ch]Em7[/ch]      022030

* - strum once

[Intro]
| [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D/C#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]D/C#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] |

[Verse]
[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Gadd#11[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
My big brother rode an Indian Scout [/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/C#[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
It was black like his jacket[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Gadd#11[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
American Spirit hangin' outta his mouth[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D/C#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Just like our daddy[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]   
He kicked started that bike one night and broke mama's heart[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
He pointed that headlight west[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]N.C.                     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Gadd#11[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
He'd call me up every couple of weeks[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/C#[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
From South California[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Gadd#11[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Talk about the desert and the Joshua Tree[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]D/C#[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
And his pretty girl stories[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
And how he bought an Airstream trailer and a J-45 guitar[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]G[/ch]
Said, "Little brother, you'd love it out here[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are"[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, it's hearts on fire and crazy dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, the nights ignite like gasoline[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D/F#[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
And light up those streets that never sleep when the sky goes dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]*                        [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]N.C.                          [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Gadd#11[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I called my brother from the back of that plane[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/C#[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
The second I made it[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Gadd#11[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
We started drinkin' on the strip in LA[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D/C#[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
And then it got crazy[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Ended up at a house in the hills with some Hollywood stars[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G[/ch]
Kissin' on a blonde in a backyard pool[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]

[Solo]
| [ch]Bm[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] |

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, yeah[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Couple iron horse rebels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Wild as the devil[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]          [ch]Asus4/C#[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I knew I had to move back east[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Said goodbye to my brother[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
At the end of that summer[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]*
But I knew he'd never leave[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]* [ch]G[/ch]*              [ch]D[/ch]*             [ch]A[/ch]*
Oh, it's hearts on fire and crazy dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, the nights ignite like gasoline[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
And oh, them Indian Scouts, man, they're built for speed[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
And oh, they said he hit that guardrail at half past three[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D/F#[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Lit up those streets that never sleep when the sky goes dark[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]*
We buried him out in the wind 'neath the West Coast stars[/tab]
[tab]N.C.                       [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D/C#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D/C#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]
